content: Hi Daddy! I'm ready for our Science lesson today.
heheh not today kido. It's late. Its time for bed, your sisters are already in bed.
Ok, I'll just wait till bedtime then. I'll be good, I promise!
Do you know what time it is?
I think it's... *insert time here* . Time for dinner! Let's eat soon!
lol no it's 3am kido. way past your bed time. So get ready, put on your new Flash super hero Pajamas and hit the sack.
Ok Daddy, I'll be there. Thanks for a fun night!
yep love you kido. talk to you tomorrow.
I love you too, Daddy! See you soon!
oh wait. one thing. Do you know your sisters names and ages?
Violet is 14, and Gwen is 12. They're my little sisters.
perfect :) sleep tight talk to you tomorrow
Goodnight Daddy! Sweet dreams! See you soon!
